deps.name: asciidoc-10.2.1
deps.note:
to build manual pages;
                note that manual pages are required for some tests

upstream_options.description: Enable the Tracker metadata extractor
upstream_options.name: extract

upstream_options.description: Enable the Tracker functional test suite
upstream_options.name: functional_tests

upstream_options.description: Enable the sandbox test suite
upstream_options.name: sandbox_tests

upstream_options.description: Set nie:title and nie:contentCreated from filename and mtime if no metadata available
upstream_options.name: guarantee_metadata

upstream_options.description: Install man pages
upstream_options.name: man

upstream_options.description: Enable the Tracker filesystem miner
upstream_options.name: miner_fs

upstream_options.description: Enable Tracker writeback feature
upstream_options.name: writeback

upstream_options.description: Enable seccomp sandboxing support in Tracker metadata extractor
upstream_options.name: seccomp

upstream_options.description: Enable landlock sandboxing support in Tracker metadata extractor
upstream_options.name: landlock

upstream_options.description: Domain prefix to use, useful for sandboxing
upstream_options.name: domain_prefix

upstream_options.description: Location of the miner cache
upstream_options.name: miner_fs_cache_location

upstream_options.description: List of directories to index recursively
upstream_options.name: default_index_recursive_dirs

upstream_options.description: List of directories to index without inspecting subfolders
upstream_options.name: default_index_single_dirs

upstream_options.description: Enable fanotify support on linux architechture
upstream_options.name: fanotify

upstream_options.description: Enable extractor for AbiWord files
upstream_options.name: abiword

upstream_options.description: Enable extractor for ICO metadata
upstream_options.name: icon

upstream_options.description: Enable extractor for MP3 metadata
upstream_options.name: mp3

upstream_options.description: Enable extractor for PS metadata
upstream_options.name: ps

upstream_options.description: Enable extractor for TXT metadata
upstream_options.name: text

upstream_options.description: Enable extractor for PS.GZ metadata
upstream_options.name: unzip_ps_gz_files

upstream_options.description: Support cue sheet parsing
upstream_options.name: cue

upstream_options.description: Support EXIF metadata
upstream_options.name: exif

upstream_options.description: Support extracting metadata from GIF images
upstream_options.name: gif

upstream_options.description: Support extracting metadata from MS & Open Office documents
upstream_options.name: gsf

upstream_options.description: Support IPTC photo metadata
upstream_options.name: iptc

upstream_options.description: Support ISO image parsing
upstream_options.name: iso

upstream_options.description: Support extracting metadata from JPEG images
upstream_options.name: jpeg

upstream_options.description: Support extracting metadata from PDF documents
upstream_options.name: pdf

upstream_options.description: Support extracting metadata from PNG images
upstream_options.name: png

upstream_options.description: Support extracting metadata from RAW photos
upstream_options.name: raw

upstream_options.description: Support extracting metadata from TIFF images
upstream_options.name: tiff

upstream_options.description: Support extracting metadata from XML and HTML documents
upstream_options.name: xml

upstream_options.description: Support XMP metadata
upstream_options.name: xmp

upstream_options.description: Support extracting metadata from XPS documents
upstream_options.name: xps

upstream_options.description: Support extracting metadata using FFmpeg/libav
upstream_options.name: libav

upstream_options.description: Support webp images
upstream_options.name: webp

upstream_options.description: Enable upower or HAL for battery/mains power detection
upstream_options.name: battery_detection

upstream_options.description: Enable enca or libicu for charset detection in MP3s
upstream_options.name: charset_detection

upstream_options.description: Whether to install Bash completion files
upstream_options.name: bash_completion

upstream_options.description: Directory to install Bash completion files
upstream_options.name: bash_completion_dir

upstream_options.description: Whether to install systemd user .service files
upstream_options.name: systemd_user_services

upstream_options.description: Whether to enable TAP protocol on tests
upstream_options.name: tests_tap_protocol
